prediction.reasoning: As an AI, I do not have access to real-time market data, historical stock performance, or the complex financial models required to provide accurate stock price predictions or actual confidence intervals. Stock market forecasting is highly speculative and influenced by numerous unpredictable factors. The point estimate provided is simply the current price, assuming no change over 18 days as a neutral baseline. The confidence intervals are illustrative, generated using hypothetical volatility assumptions (approximating a 4% standard deviation of price movement over 18 days scaled by standard Z-scores for each confidence level). These numbers should not be taken as financial advice or an actual prediction.
